message:
feat(embedder): implement static-retrieval-mrl-en-v1 ONNX backend

Implement bd-14l - StaticMrlEmbedder for static embedding with MRL support:

- Add StaticMrlEmbedder struct with ONNX Runtime session and tokenizer
- Implement Embedder trait with supports_mrl()=true, category()=StaticEmbedder
- Mean pooling with attention mask for 3D model outputs
- L2 normalization with proper re-normalization after MRL truncation
- Standard model search paths (xf cache, data dir, HuggingFace hub)
- Wire into ModelRegistry for dynamic loading by name
- Add ort, tokenizers, ndarray dependencies to Cargo.toml
- Add 4 unit tests, 5 integration tests (require model files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
